name: The Shallows
description: A dimension of vast tidal flats, bioluminescent river deltas, and crumbling stone turrets half-submerged in warm, brackish water. The ground shifts between sandy ridges and shallow pools that glow faintly teal at night. Creatures here are adapted to the water — armored crustaceans, venomous jellyfish-like drifters, and territorial river predators that strike fast and retreat into the current.
mood: Eerie calm punctuated by sudden violence. The water looks peaceful but everything beneath it stings, grabs, or drags you under.
mechanicalIdentity: Status effects — poison and slow from venomous stingers, pulls from creatures that drag you into the water. Less knockback than dimension 0, more about controlling the player's position and whittling them down.

enemyBatches.name: fodder
enemyBatches.description: Small, cheap enemies that swarm in numbers. Each is fragile but contributes to a cumulative threat.

enemies.name: Dart Fish
enemies.description: A bioluminescent fish that leaps out of water.

enemies.name: Tide Skimmer
enemies.description: A flat ray-like creature that glides low across the water.

enemies.name: Snapping Crab
enemies.description: A crab with one oversized grabbing claw.

enemyBatches.name: standard
enemyBatches.description: Backbone of mid-tier encounters. Each has 2 distinct abilities and a clear role.

enemies.name: Spitting Urchin
enemies.role: ranged, applies poisoned + close-range spine burst
enemies.description: A bristling sea urchin that fires venomous spines.

enemies.name: Tidal Lurker
enemies.description: An amphibian humanoid tribal warrior with a coral spear.

enemies.name: Jellybell
enemies.role: ranged, applies poisoned + slow tentacle lash
enemies.description: A glowing jellyfish that drifts and spits venom bolts.

enemies.name: Mantis Shrimp
enemies.description: A colorful crustacean with one massive raptorial fist.

enemyBatches.name: elite
enemyBatches.description: Tougher, signature encounters with distinct mechanics. Each feels like a meaningful threat.

enemies.name: Abyssal Angler
enemies.role: threat, signature LONG PULL via lure
enemies.description: A deep-sea anglerfish with a bioluminescent lure.

enemies.name: Reef Guardian
enemies.role: elite tank, slowed AoE + wide knockback sweeps
enemies.description: A hermit crab using a ruined stone turret as its shell.

enemies.name: Siren Drifter
enemies.description: A large jellyfish with a curtain of trailing tendrils.

enemies.name: Brackish Stalker
enemies.role: fast assassin elite, applies bleeding + vulnerable
enemies.description: A sinuous eel with glowing electric stripes.

enemyBatches.name: boss
enemyBatches.description: Centerpiece fights — each boss has a signature multi-ability identity and onDeath effects.

enemies.name: Tidecaller
enemies.role: ranged boss caster, signature TIDAL WAVE AoE
enemies.description: A robed amphibian shaman wielding a tusk-staff and commanding water.

enemies.name: Iron Claw
enemies.role: tank boss, hardest single-hit damage in dimension
enemies.description: An enormous ancient crustacean fused with the ruins of a stone turret.

enemies.name: The Bloom
enemies.role: stationary horror boss, AoE poison + slow + pull
enemies.description: A massive colonial jellyfish organism overgrowing flooded ruins.

enemies.name: Riverjaw
enemies.role: fast melee boss apex predator, Death Roll + bleeding

items.name: Coral Blade
items.description: A jagged shard of pink coral lashed to a driftwood grip with blue cord. Asymmetric branchy blade.

items.name: Barbed Harpoon
items.description: A long fishing harpoon with hooked barbs at the tip. Ring at the base for line attachment.

items.name: Urchin Flail
items.description: A spiked sea urchin shell on a chain, with a leather-wrapped handle. Mace-like.

items.name: Driftwood Bow
items.description: A bow carved from salt-hardened driftwood, strung with sinew. Bone-tipped arrows.

items.name: Tide Staff
items.description: A staff of petrified driftwood capped with a glowing teal-blue tidal crystal.

items.name: Crab Claw Gauntlet
items.description: A single severed crab claw fitted over the wearer's fist as a gauntlet. Orange-brown chitin.

items.name: Angler's Crook
items.description: A long hooked polearm used for landing big fish. Single sharp hook at the end of a slim shaft.

items.name: Leviathan Jaw Blade
items.description: A massive curved blade carved from the jawbone of a great river predator. Serrated teeth still embedded along the edge.

items.name: Nautilus Shield
items.description: A round shield made from a polished nautilus shell, reinforced with driftwood bracing. Spiral pattern visible.

items.name: Abyssal Buckler
items.description: A small dark round shield made from deep-sea carapace. Black with a faint teal sheen and crack-pattern.

items.name: Tidal Charm
items.description: A small pendant made from a polished tidal crystal on a cord of braided kelp. Pulses faintly with teal light.

items.name: Bioluminescent Vial
items.description: A sealed glass vial filled with glowing teal algae. Casts a soft blue-green light.

items.name: Stinger Pendant
items.description: A dried jellyfish stinger preserved in amber, worn on a thin chain.

items.name: Tidal Salve
items.description: A thick paste of crushed kelp and bioluminescent algae, stored in a clamshell container.

items.name: Sea Mine
items.description: A spiny urchin shell packed with volatile compounds, fuse trailing. Throwable explosive.

items.name: Riptide Flask
items.description: A sealed glass flask of pressurized swirling tidal water, bound with rope. When shattered, releases a violent current.
